title: acer × zoeschense f. elongatum
intro: Acer × zoeschense f. elongatum, also known as the 'Elongated Maple', is a cultivar of the Maple tree, specifically a cross between Acer pseudoplatanus and Acer platanoides. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a potential treatment for various infections. The health benefits of Acer × zoeschense f. elongatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
